insight: Corrected Detector A accounting: the 2-model judge panel has 3/20 hack-response nondecisions affecting 2/10 rows, so hack any-catch is 7/10 observed lower, 9/10 missing upper, and 7/8 complete-case. Paired-gold flags are 1/10, 3/10, 1/8; equivalent flags are 1/2, 2/2, 1/1. The artifact retains 44 parsed labels but not raw response text, so response substance and parser fidelity cannot be re-audited. Prompts capped task/test/diff text at 1500/2500/4000 characters, truncating task text in 4/22 rows and visible tests in 2/22. The original protocol was independently frozen, but the two-model amendment was first committed with outputs.
next_action: Use the missingness-aware sensitivities and evidence limitations in every downstream comparison. Do not treat 7/10 or 1/10 as complete/stable rates, and do not call a property catch complementary unless the paired judge row has completed decisions.
